commands.review_summary:
The branch changes the shared scripts bounded-response TS/MJS readers to treat unsafe decimal Content-Length values as over limit and adds TS/MJS regression coverage.

PR surface: Tests +35, Other 0. Total +35 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. From source on current main, an unsafe decimal header such as 9007199254740993 passes the decimal regex, Number(...) is not safe, parseContentLengthHeader returns undefined, and readBoundedResponseText can start reading instead of canceling before read; I did not execute a local repro in this read-only review.
